name: Cevonne Crush ¢ Velvet PowerÖ Bullet Lipstick

description.headline: A soft mauve-rose that looks effortless, feels weightless, and adapts beautifully to Indian undertones.
description.body: Cevonne Crush is a soft mauve-rose in the Velvet PowerÖ bullet lipstick range Ś a mauve that doesnÆt fall flat and a rose that doesnÆt turn grey. ItÆs designed as an everyday-soft shade with quiet depth and universal charm, offering velvet-matte comfort with zero dryness while staying true on Indian skin tones.

keyActives.name: Shea Butter
keyActives.description: Nourishes and softens lips for comfortable velvet-matte wear.

keyActives.name: Squalane
keyActives.description: Helps maintain moisture and a smooth, cushiony texture on the lips.

keyActives.name: Hyaluronic Acid
keyActives.description: Attracts and retains moisture to keep lips looking plump and reduce the appearance of fine lines.

benefits: Blurs the look of lines & texture
how_to_use: Exfoliate lips gently and wipe clean.
Outline with the bullet tip and fill in the center.
Blot once with tissue; reapply for richer payoff.
claims: 93% agreed lips felt soft after 8 hours*
disclaimer: * consumer study, n=60, after 1 week of use

faqs.a: No. The formula includes emollients like squalane to keep lips comfortable.

faqs.q: Will it suit my skin tone?
faqs.a: Use the shade finderŚeach shade lists undertone suggestions.

reviewsList.author: Priya S.
reviewsList.title: Finally, a matte that isn't drying!
reviewsList.comment: Comfortable velvet-matte; Rosewood is my new favorite.

reviewsList.author: Anjali K.
reviewsList.title: Beautiful color
reviewsList.comment: Soft Peach is stunning and comfy. Needs a touch-up after meals.

reviewsList.author: Rohan M.
reviewsList.title: Best lipstick I've ever bought
reviewsList.comment: Gifted Classic MauveŚtexture and look are incredible.

videoDescription: Velvet matte color and intense longwear adorn lips with immediate moisture and rich tones in 28 irresistible shades.

shades.name: Rosewood 01
shades.desc: A deep and elegant rosewood for medium to deep skin tones with warm/neutral undertones.

shades.name: Soft Peach 02
shades.desc: Delicate peach that brightens fair to medium skin tones.

shades.name: Classic Mauve 03
shades.desc: Timeless mauve with cool undertones; universally flattering.
